versions.version_description: Complete chords and lyrics / different approach / split and open chords with voicings and basic tab.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Brass in Pocket – The Pretenders (1980)

[Intro]
[ch]Asus4[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Asus2[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch]
        I got brass…       in pocket[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Asus2[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch] – [ch]A[/ch]
        I got bottle…      I'm gonna use it[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch] – [ch]F#sus4[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch] – [ch]D[/ch]
        Intention,          I feel inventive[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]E11[/ch]
Gonna make you, make you, make you notice[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Asus2[/ch]     [ch]Asus4[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch]
        Commotion…      restrained emotion[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Asus2[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch]
        I've been driving, Detroit leaning[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch] – [ch]F#sus4[/ch]                    [ch]Dsus2[/ch] – [ch]D[/ch]
        No reason, just seems so pleasing[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]E11[/ch]
Gonna make you, make you, make you notice[/tab]

[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]E9sus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]
        Gonna use my arms,      gonna use my legs[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]E9sus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]
        Gonna use my style,     gonna use my sidestep[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]E9sus4[/ch] – [ch]E[/ch]
        Gonna use my fingers,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Esus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]E9sus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]
Gonna use my, my, my imagination, whoohoo[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]
'Cos I gonna make you see[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]
There's nobody else here[/tab]
No one like me
[tab]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch] – [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch]
I'm special,     so special[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E11[/ch]
I got to have some of your attention, give it to me[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Asus2[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch]
        I got rhythm,     can't miss the beat[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Asus2[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch]
        I got a new skank,        it's so reet[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch] – [ch]F#sus4[/ch]          [ch]Dsus2[/ch] – [ch]D[/ch]
        I got something,        I'm winking at you[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]E11[/ch]
        Gonna make you, make you, make you notice[/tab]

[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]E9sus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]
        Gonna use my arms,      gonna use my legs[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]E9sus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]
        Gonna use my style,     gonna use my sidestep[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]E9sus4[/ch] – [ch]E[/ch]
        Gonna use my fingers,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Esus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]E9sus4[/ch] - [ch]E[/ch]
        Gonna use my, my, my imagination, whoohoo[/tab]

[Chorus]

'Cos I'm gonna make you see[/tab]

There's nobody else here[/tab]
No one like me

I'm special,     so special[/tab]

I got to have some of your attention, give it to me[/tab]
